title: Created Elevators
description: An addon for the OpenBlocks Elevator mod to make it match the style of the Create mod.
body:
A resource pack addon for the OpenBlocks Elevator mod that enhances its visual appeal by reworking its textures to seamlessly match the distinctive style of the Create mod.

This addon ensures that the elevator blocks blend naturally with Create’s aesthetic, providing a more immersive and cohesive experience for players who enjoy both mods.
